mapper.select: SELECT CHAPTER_ID, COURSE_ID, CHAPTER_TITLE, CHAPTER_ORDER, VIDEO_URL, VIDEO_PATH, ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, DURATION_SECONDS, SUMMARY_TEXT, TRANSCRIPT_TEXT, AI_GENERATED_YN, QUIZ_BUILD_STATUS, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM COURSE_CHAPTER WHERE CHAPTER_ID = #{chapterId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CHAPTER_ID, COURSE_ID, CHAPTER_TITLE, CHAPTER_ORDER, VIDEO_URL, VIDEO_PATH, ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_SIZE, DURATION_SECONDS, SUMMARY_TEXT, TRANSCRIPT_TEXT, AI_GENERATED_YN, QUIZ_BUILD_STATUS, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM COURSE_CHAPTER WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND QUIZ_BUILD_STATUS = 'PENDING' ORDER BY CHAPTER_ID ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE_CHAPTER SET TRANSCRIPT_TEXT = #{transcriptText}, AI_GENERATED_YN = 'Y', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CHAPTER_ID = #{chapterId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
